chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, KARACHI CP. No. D-608 of 2013 ------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- Date Order with Signature(s) of Judge(s) D/o matter For hearing of CMA No.19480 /2017. 06.12.2018 Mr. Nishat Warsi, advocate for the respondent No.2. **************** This Court vide judgment dated 16.5.2017 dismissed the captioned Petition of the Petitioner-Company, thereafter Respondent No.2 moved an application on the ground that Petitioner-Company may be directed to deposit an amount of Rs.40,50,000/- with the Nazir of this Court. Record reflects that the Petitioner deposited an amount of Rs.9,22,000/- with the Nazir of this Court. The aforesaid amount was undisputed and payable to the Respondent No.2 and the same was released in his favour. We have been informed that the Petitioner-Company assailed the order of this Court before the Hon’ble Supreme Court, which Petition was dismissed vide order dated 08.8.2018. Learned counsel for the Respondent No.2 has moved an application and contended that as per Nazir’s Report a sum of Rs.9, 22,000/- is lying in his office. Per learned counsel the aforesaid amount is not actual amount rather lesser amount has been deposited by the Petitioner- Company. He further claims that the Respondent No.2 is entitled full payment as per his entitlement. To see as to whether the orders passed by this Court have been complied with in its letter and spirit or otherwise, let notice be repeated upon the Petitioner-Company for 15.1.2019. JUDGE JUDGE Nadir/PA
